mapper.sql: select w.id, w.project_id, w.user_id, w.category_id, w.internal_workload, w.external_workload, w.internal_price, w.external_price, w.internal_output, w.external_output, w.price_source, w.extra_data::text as extra_data, w.del_flag, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark from proj_workload w
mapper.select: select w.id, w.project_id, w.user_id, w.category_id, w.internal_workload, w.external_workload, w.internal_price, w.external_price, w.internal_output, w.external_output, w.price_source, w.extra_data::text as extra_data, w.del_flag, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark, p.project_name, u.user_name, c.name as category_name from proj_workload w left join proj_project p on p.id = w.project_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = w.user_id left join proj_category c on c.id = w.category_id where w.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into proj_workload( project_id, user_id, category_id, internal_workload, external_workload, internal_price, external_price, internal_output, external_output, price_source, extra_data, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{internalWorkload}, #{externalWorkload}, #{internalPrice}, #{externalPrice}, #{internalOutput}, #{externalOutput}, #{priceSource}, #{extraData}::jsonb, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.delete:
update proj_workload set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
